# kSecAttrCreationDate

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that indicates the item’s creation date.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrCreationDate: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDate] and represents the date the item was created. Read only.
title: kSecAttrCreationDate
